de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionLoopCondition

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IExecutionBlockStartNode<JavaStatement>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<JavaStatement>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ExecutionLoopCondition, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopCondition

    public interface IExecutionLoopCondition
extends IExecutionBlockStartNode<JavaStatement>

    A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a loop condition, e.g. x >= 0.

    The default implementation is ExecutionLoopCondition which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder, ExecutionLoopCondition

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.IExecutionNode

      Expression getGuardExpression()
      Returns the loop expression which is executed.
      PositionInfo getGuardExpressionPositionInfo()
      Returns the code position of the executed loop expression (getGuardExpression()).

      • getGuardExpression

        Expression getGuardExpression()
        Returns the loop expression which is executed.
        Returns:

      • getGuardExpressionPositionInfo

        PositionInfo getGuardExpressionPositionInfo()
        Returns the code position of the executed loop expression (getGuardExpression()).
        Returns:
        The code of the executed loop expression.
